value.template: Your content goes directly to the provider you configure. LinguaMesh never bundles an API key.

messages.description: Heading for the Linux provider-profile configuration card.
Privacy and persistence note shown in the Linux provider-profile card.

value.template: Names, endpoints, model preferences, and credentials can be remembered through Secret Service. Credentials are cleared from this form immediately and remain session-only when secure storage is unavailable. Removing a saved profile does not disconnect its current session.

value.template: Remove the selected saved profile without disconnecting its current session

value.template: Optional credential; it is kept in memory unless remembered through Secret Service

messages.description: Label for remembering a Linux provider profile in Secret Service.

value.template: Remember profile, model, and credential in Secret Service

messages.description: Tooltip for remembering a Linux provider profile.

value.template: Save non-secret profile data and the credential through Secret Service

Label for the saved Linux provider-profile selector.

Chinese source-language option for Linux translation.

Linux provider-setup stage title while the worker starts.
Linux provider-setup stage title when the worker is unavailable.
Linux provider-setup stage title while the user configures a profile.
Linux provider-setup stage title while a provider connects.
Linux provider-setup stage title while a model is selected.
Linux provider-setup stage title after provider and model readiness.
Linux provider-setup explanation while startup checks run.

value.template: Checking profile storage and starting the local validation provider. No provider connection is made automatically.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation when the worker is unavailable.

value.template: The core worker is unavailable. Restart the application and review any error below; no provider request can be sent.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup warning when saved profile storage is unavailable.

value.template: Saved profile storage is unavailable. Configure a provider below and leave Remember off; credentials stay in memory for this session only.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation when no saved profile exists.

value.template: Create a provider profile below, enter a credential only if required, then choose Connect. Remembering uses Secret Service; otherwise the credential remains in memory for this session only.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation when saved profiles exist.

value.template: Choose a saved profile below, re-enter its credential if required, then choose Connect. Restored profiles never connect automatically.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation while a named provider connects.

value.template: Validating {provider} [{profile_id}] and discovering models. The previous active provider remains unchanged until this succeeds.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation while model discovery completes.

value.template: Validating the provider and discovering models. The previous active provider remains unchanged until this succeeds.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation before a discovered model is confirmed.

value.template: Choose a discovered model. Translation remains disabled until the selection is confirmed.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup explanation while a named model is committed.

value.template: Confirming model {model}. Translation remains disabled until this selection is committed.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup summary naming the next provider and model.

value.template: Next request: {provider} · {model}. Use the saved-profile list and Connect to switch deliberately.

messages.description: Linux provider-setup warning appended when persistence is unavailable.

value.template: Saved profile storage is unavailable; profile persistence is disabled, Remember stays off, and credentials remain session only.

messages.description: Announced below the locale selector while draft translations are active.

value.template: Simplified Chinese resources are loaded from the pinned runtime catalog; translations remain unreviewed drafts.

messages.description: Notification body shown when a translation completes.

value.template: The translated output is ready in LinguaMesh.

messages.description: Notification title shown when a translation completes.
Active and pending provider summary with persistence modes.
Pending provider connection summary.
No-provider summary explaining session-only credential behavior.

value.template: No provider connected. Credentials stay session-only unless remembered through Secret Service.

messages.description: Persistence mode shown for a pending provider that will be remembered.

value.template: will be saved with Secret Service credential protection when supplied

messages.description: Persistence mode shown for an active saved provider.
Persistence mode shown for a session-only provider.
Restored profile summary prompting deliberate connection.

value.template: Saved non-secret profiles were restored. Choose one, enter its credential if required, then connect.
